task_completion.description: A terminal window is open and shows command activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal/console window is visible on screen with text output

task_completion.description: Transformer channel created via REST API
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal shows curl POST to /api/channels with XML body containing transformer elements, and a channel ID returned

task_completion.description: Channel has transformation logic (HL7 to XML)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal shows channel XML with transformer elements, JavaScript code, or outboundDataType set to XML
Terminal shows deployment command executed or dashboard shows channel in STARTED state
Terminal shows file listing with XML output files or file content starting with XML tags

integrity.description: NextGen Connect environment is properly running
integrity.visual_evidence: Docker containers are running and API is accessible

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a channel that transforms HL7 messages to XML format. Success indicators: (1) channel created via REST API with transformer/datatype config, (2) channel deployed, (3) output files are XML format. Note that File Writer output goes inside the Docker container.
